title: Peppery Croatian Chicken Wings Stir-fry
description: This halal-friendly peppery stir-fry features crispy chicken wings with a burst of fresh herbs and spices.
instructions: In a shallow dish, mix olive oil, red chili flakes, minced garlic, lemon pepper powder, chopped parsley, salt, and pepper.
Place chicken wings in the marinade and turn to coat evenly. Let marinate for at least 1 hour or up to overnight in refrigerator.
Arrange chicken wings on a wire rack placed over baking sheet covered with aluminum foil.
Bake for 25 minutes then flip wings, drizzle remaining marinade over them, and bake another 10-15 minutes until golden brown and crispy.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
